scope: Accepted Phase 2 and Phase 3 prerequisite inventory for the first TFL 6 model-input bundle. This manifest does not generate model-input tables, ForestModel XML, Matrix Builder outputs, or a Patchworks runtime package.

accepted_prerequisites.role: active TFL 6 run profile and Phase 3 artifact registry
accepted clipped 2025 VRI/VDYP input-layer manifest
accepted clipped 2025 R1 geometry and stand attribution source
accepted 2025 VDYP7 polygon table filtered to TFL 6 feature IDs
accepted 2025 VDYP7 layer table filtered to TFL 6 feature IDs
accepted Phase 2 THLB recipe surface
accepted Phase 2 THLB status and benchmark-tolerance summary
accepted Phase 2 THLB execution audit and milestone metrics
AFLB restart checkpoint expected by the THLB status report
accepted_prerequisites.p4_implication: Must be rematerialized or regenerated before a bundle build consumes checkpoint geometry.

accepted_prerequisites.role: LHLB restart checkpoint expected by the THLB status report
accepted_prerequisites.p4_implication: Must be rematerialized or regenerated before a bundle build consumes checkpoint geometry.

accepted_prerequisites.role: final THLB checkpoint expected by the THLB status report
accepted_prerequisites.p4_implication: Must be rematerialized or regenerated before a bundle build consumes final THLB geometry.

accepted_prerequisites.role: accepted static AU and yield-curve assignment contract
reviewed static AU universe
selected top-area stratum set used for source-derived curve compilation
reviewed stand-to-AU attribution surface used by Phase 3 diagnostics
accepted natural/untreated VDYP curve table for selected AU families
accepted natural-curve shape diagnostics with smoothing revisit caveat
lexicographic remap audit for non-AU source stratum bins
MP10 Tables 27-29 TIPSY parameter evidence
selected-AU to MP10 parameter-row/fallback mapping
reviewed selected-AU BatchTIPSY input
reviewed BatchTIPSY output
accepted treated/managed BatchTIPSY curve table
accepted treated-curve QA diagnostics
accepted treatment IDs, eligibility filters, harvest-system classes, and reporting hooks
TFL 6 silviculture/treatment config handoff
accepted state-transition contract
accepted cedar signal, product/account/reporting handoff
accepted K3Z/NICF reference and outside-AOI expansion identity handoff

blocked_for_bundle_build_until: Final THLB checkpoint geometry is rematerialized or regenerated at a stable P4 input path.
P4.1b defines the generated bundle paths and table roles.
P4.1c writes the first reviewed bundle only after the checkpoint availability gap is closed or explicitly waived.
